_template._comment: Copy this object to add a new project. Delete the _template and _comment keys — they are ignored by the app (see lib/projects.ts). Use EITHER youtubeId (just the ID, e.g. 'dQw4w9WgXcQ') OR instagramUrl (the full reel/post URL, e.g. 'https://www.instagram.com/reel/Cxxxxxxxxx/') — YouTube gives a real grid thumbnail, Instagram-only projects always render as a title-card tile since there's no simple public thumbnail for Instagram. tintColor is optional (hex string); if omitted, a color is auto-assigned from the accent palette by index. Descriptions/credits below marked 'Add ...' are placeholders — fill in the real specifics whenever you get a chance.
_template.title: Project / Campaign Title
_template.description: Two to three lines describing the concept, the shoot, or the outcome.
